title: Infrastructure Project Manager
published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
desc.1: As an Infrastructure Project Manager in Avignon, you lead IT infrastructure transformation projects for our clients. You ensure project success (Quality, Cost, Deadline).
mission.1: Piloter les projets infrastructure (virtualisation, cloud, stockage, réseau)
mission.2: Définir les architectures cibles avec les équipes techniques
mission.3: Coordonner les intervenants internes et prestataires
mission.4: Gérer le budget et le planning des projets
profile.1: Bac+4/5 en informatique ou management de projet
profile.2: 4 à 8 years of experience in projets infrastructure
profile.4: Certification PMP ou ITIL is a plus
